description: Create a population density heatmap for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, admin/Admin123!). Use a new style named 'heatmap_population' in the 'ne' workspace configured with the 'vec:Heatmap' rendering transformation. The transformation must use the 'pop_max' weight attribute, a radius between 15 and 60 pixels, FLOAT output, and a color map gradient with at least 4 colors. Export the resulting heatmap as an 800x400 PNG image covering the world bounds (-180, -90, 180, 90) to /home/ga/heatmap_output.png.
